text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ready up, Urara! I'm about to tell you<n>how to
make my special Shining Mud<n>Dumplings!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Golshi... I came here because you<n>promised with a
big, smug grin that you<n>had "extremely valuable
data" to share.<n>You'd better not tell me you were<n>
referring to meaningless mud dumplings.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Par-don? What the flip else would Imean? I'm talkin' about how to create anational treasure here.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Mud balls aren't a national treasure!<n>Tch... I'm
such an idiot to fall for your<n>nonsense.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! No fighting! Bad! Be nice and get<n>along
with each other!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's not a fight... Hm? Wait, there's<n>something odd
about that pillar over<n>there. Is there... a hole in it?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, the hole, yeah. I chucked a mud<n>dumpling
and—pop!—put a hole right<n>through it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Wha—?! Th-that's impossible! Just how<n>dense are
these dumplings of yours?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Golshi. Tell me how they're<n>formed. I'm
not leaving until you spit it<n>out!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah, now I've piqued your curiosity, eh?That's the end of that, then. It's too latefor you. You've finally fallen down theendless rabbit hole that is... muddumplings.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, now we're getting along great! ♪
